plan.macOSSharingHint: Enable macOS Printer Sharing, then share the target printer as Office Printer.
plan.manualTestPageInstruction: From Windows Settings, open Printers & scanners, select Veil Mac Printer, and print a test page.
setupSteps: On macOS, enable Printer Sharing and share the printer name shown in sharedPrinterName.
verificationSteps: Run windowsVerifyPrinterCommand and confirm the printer is present.
limitations: This is a manual IPP experiment, not automatic Parallels-style printer provisioning yet.
nextActions: Run the generated Add-Printer command inside Windows after the guest is installed and networked.
Keep the original evidence file available locally; Veil records metadata and does not copy printer output into diagnostics.
Use this proof before graduating printer bridge beyond manual-ipp-experiment.
